fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip:
This field is used internally.
You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the quote, order, invoice, credit memo, return order, or blanket order that the comment applies to.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who created this approval comment.

fields.name: Date and Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time that the comment was made.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies the comment. You can enter a maximum of 250 characters, both numbers and letters.
